hero.title: The Art of Omotenashi
hero.subtitle: An intimate Japanese house in Makati.
hero.description: Tatler Best Restaurants Philippines. A small counter, attentive service, and an evening composed around the day's finest ingredients flown from Japan.
hero.japaneseText3: 細部まで行き届く心配り

atDaimasu.title: Japan, brought quietly to your table.
atDaimasu.description: Daimasu — "great celebration" — is an intimate Japanese house in Makati. Each evening, the chef composes a course around the day's finest seafood and produce flown from Japan. The room seats few; every dish is built for the guest in front of it.

craftedWithPrecision.title: Crafted with Restraint
craftedWithPrecision.description: The kitchen works in the discipline of traditional Japanese cooking: knife technique honed over years, a curated sake list selected by hand, and a respect for season that quietly determines the menu. Nothing on the counter exists without intention.

moreThanAMeal.title: An Invitation, Not a Reservation
moreThanAMeal.description: Omotenashi is not a service standard — it is the assumption that the meal began the moment you decided to come. Our team learns your name, your seat, your pace. The evening unfolds at the rhythm of the room, never the rhythm of a turn.
moreThanAMeal.japaneseText1: 静かな夕食や特別な祝いごと、気軽なランチでも、
moreThanAMeal.japaneseText2: 一人ひとりに寄り添い、心に残るひとときを。
moreThanAMeal.japaneseText3: 大枡では、日本の心「おもてなし」を大切に。
